message.content:
@startuml
title 3. 女の子の招待

hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F2
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F2
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  ParticipantPadding 30
  BoxPadding 10
}

actor "お嬢" as O
participant "グループスタッフ" as GS
participant "CABABA" as C
database "データベース" as DB
participant "CABABA管理者" as ADM

box "女の子登録" #FFFFFF
  GS -> C : 設定画面から女の子の参加招待URLを作成
  activate C
  C -> DB : SELECT Group.group_id
  DB --> C
  C --> GS : 参加招待URLを表示
  deactivate C

  GS -> O : URLを共有
  activate O
  O -> C : URLをクリック, LINEログイン画面へ
  deactivate O

  activate C
  C -> DB : UPDATE hostess.groups.add
  DB --> C
  deactivate C

  C --> GS : お嬢のグループ登録完了
end box

@enduml
